nasb.text: They struck among the Philistines that day from Michmash to Aijalon. And the people were very weary.

esv.text: They struck down the Philistines that day from Michmash to Aijalon. And the people were very faint.

cnv.text: 那一天，他們擊殺非利士人，從密抹直到亞雅崙；眾人都非常疲乏了，

ccb.text: 那天，以色列人追杀非利士人，从密抹一直追杀到亚雅仑，众人疲惫不堪。
